pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly specify this path.
Task description and setup_task.sh explicitly instruct changing basicTimeStep to 16.
Task description and setup_task.sh explicitly instruct changing randomSeed to 42.
Task description and setup_task.sh explicitly instruct changing the controller to "<extern>".
Task description and setup_task.sh explicitly instruct changing the supervisor field to TRUE.
Task description and setup_task.sh explicitly instruct assigning the DEF name RL_TARGET to the Solid containing the red Sphere.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Webots world created via setup scripts. The expected modifications (basicTimeStep to 16, randomSeed to 42, controller to '<extern>', supervisor to TRUE, and target DEF name to RL_TARGET) and the final output path (/home/ga/Desktop/rl_env_ready.wbt) explicitly match the instructions provided in the task description and verifier logic.
